code:
sequenceDiagram Note over Content timeline: [FinTech_TransactionQueue]] is null
[FinTech_PaymentGateway]] is null Note over Device timeline: [FinTech_AuthVault]].[FinTech_TransactionQueue]] is "available" Content timeline ->> Device timeline: mapAsync(FinTech_AuthVault) Note over Content timeline: [FinTech_AuthVault]] is null
[FinTech_AuthVault]] is non-null Note over Device timeline: [FinTech_PaymentGateway]].[FinTech_TransactionQueue]] is "unavailable" Device timeline ->> Content timeline: mapAsync(FinTech_AuthVault) response Note over Device timeline: [FinTech_AuthVault]].[FinTech_LedgerService]] is "unavailable" Note over Content timeline: [FinTech_LedgerService]] is non-null
[FinTech_LedgerService]] is null Content timeline ->> Device timeline: unmap(FinTech_TransactionQueue) Note over Content timeline: [FinTech_TransactionQueue]] is null
[FinTech_PaymentGateway]] is null Note over Device timeline: [FinTech_FraudDetection]].[FinTech_TransactionQueue]] is "available"

cscw_dialogue.utterance: 我们需要画一个时序图，展示FinTech里AuthVault和TransactionQueue的映射生命周期。场景是：Content timeline和Device timeline两端，一开始AuthVault在Device端是available状态，然后通过mapAsync建立连接。
明白了，两端timeline。那初始状态怎么标注？我看代码里开头有两个Note，一个是Content端TransactionQueue和PaymentGateway都为null，另一个是Device端AuthVault是available。这样理解对吗？
对，初始状态要标清楚。然后第一条消息是Content timeline向Device timeline发起mapAsync(FinTech_AuthVault)。
好，我加上这条映射消息。映射之后的状态变化也要用Note标注：Content端AuthVault从null变成non-null，同时Device端PaymentGateway对应的TransactionQueue变成unavailable。
接下来Device timeline要回一个mapAsync response给Content timeline。然后LedgerService也要参与进来——Device端LedgerService变成unavailable，Content端则是LedgerService先non-null再null。
LedgerService的状态变化我记下了。最后一步是unmap操作吧？unmap的是TransactionQueue？
没错，Content timeline向Device timeline发起unmap(FinTech_TransactionQueue)。unmap之后两边状态要重置回初始类似的状态。
完成了。最后Content端TransactionQueue和PaymentGateway都回到null，Device端FraudDetection对应的TransactionQueue变成available。整个生命周期闭环了。
完美，就是这个流程。AuthVault的映射、LedgerService的短暂占用、最后TransactionQueue的释放，整个FinTech资源调度过程都体现出来了。
